page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9ae.large is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.r9ae server family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 2.25 GHz. The instance features 2 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing a total of 2 vCPUs. It is equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance operates on the KVM hypervisor. It does not include any local storage, meaning storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. The network configuration provides a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance.

Given the high memory density of 8.0 GB per vCPU, the ecs.r9ae.large is structured for memory-intensive workloads that do not require high compute core counts. This hardware profile is suitable for small-scale databases, caching layers, and memory-bound enterprise applications. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource sharing, offering a predictable resource profile for production environments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9ae.large is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance from the ecs.r9ae family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features an AMD EPYC 9T95 x86_64 processor operating at 2.25 GHz, delivering 2 dedicated vCPUs across 2 physical cores with a single thread per core. The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage solutions, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. With its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density, this instance is designed for memory-sensitive workloads such as small-scale databases, caching layers, and memory-bound enterprise applications that require predictable performance without high compute core counts.
